chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-6039 of 2021 C.P. No. D-508 of 2020 C.P. No. D-2588 of 2020 C.P. No. D-3749 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No. 25510/2021 2. For hearing of main case 11-02-2025 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shahzad Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 6039/202, D-3749/20201 Mr. Ali Almani Advocate for Petitioner in CP D-508/2020 Syed Rehmat Shakil Advocate for Petitioner in CP D-2588 of 2020 Syed Irshad-ur-Rehman Advocate for Respondent Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo Advocate for Respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Per respective learned counsel these petitions impugn notices, however, the same shall be respondent to by the Petitioners before the issuing authority. Respective learned counsel seek that the notices be determined vide a speaking order after providing an opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the Petitioners. Learned counsel for the Respondent department articulates no cavil and states that these petitions may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Office to place copy of order in each connected file. Judge Judge Amjad PS
